name: AccountMaxReads
definition: Maximum read capacity units the account can use in the Region for provisioned tables.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Account-scoped metric so table group-by is invalid

name: AccountMaxTableLevelReads
definition: Maximum read capacity units any single table or GSI in the account can use in the Region.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Account-scoped metric so table group-by is invalid

name: AccountMaxTableLevelWrites
definition: Maximum write capacity units any single table or GSI in the account can use in the Region.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Account-scoped metric so table group-by is invalid

name: AccountMaxWrites
definition: Maximum write capacity units the account can use in the Region for provisioned tables.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Account-scoped metric so table group-by is invalid

name: AccountProvisionedReadCapacityUtilization
definition: Percentage of provisioned read capacity used across the account in a Region; quota proximity context.
absence_means: No provisioned tables in region or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Account scope is too broad for table drilldowns

name: AccountProvisionedWriteCapacityUtilization
definition: Percentage of provisioned write capacity used across the account in a Region; quota proximity context.
optional_context_fields: No provisioned tables in region or namespace mismatch
absence_means: Account scope is too broad for table drilldowns
cardinality_footguns: cloudwatch=AccountProvisionedWriteCapacityUtilization

name: ConsumedReadCapacityUnits
definition: Read capacity actually consumed over the time period; best baseline for read demand and one denominator for read saturation.
absence_means: No reads or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep default grouping at table scope because GSI context is not present in this workspace

name: ConsumedWriteCapacityUnits
definition: Write capacity actually consumed over the time period; best baseline for write demand and one denominator for write saturation.
absence_means: No writes or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep default grouping at table scope because GSI context is not present in this workspace

name: MaxProvisionedTableReadCapacityUtilization
definition: Highest provisioned read-capacity utilization observed on any single table or GSI in the account during the interval.
absence_means: No provisioned tables in region or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Account-scoped metric so it cannot identify the hot table by itself

name: MaxProvisionedTableWriteCapacityUtilization
definition: Highest provisioned write-capacity utilization observed on any single table or GSI in the account during the interval.
absence_means: No provisioned tables in region or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Account-scoped metric so it cannot identify the hot table by itself

name: ProvisionedReadCapacityUnits
definition: Provisioned read capacity configured for a table; denominator for read headroom in this workspace.
absence_means: Table is on-demand or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use table grouping only because GSI context is not present in this workspace

name: ProvisionedWriteCapacityUnits
definition: Provisioned write capacity configured for a table; denominator for write headroom in this workspace.
absence_means: Table is on-demand or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use table grouping only because GSI context is not present in this workspace

name: OnDemandMaxReadRequestUnits
definition: Configured or effective read ceiling for on-demand read request units at table or GSI level.
optional_context_fields: Table is provisioned or metric not ingested in this workspace
absence_means: Useful only for on-demand or mixed fleets
cardinality_footguns: cloudwatch=OnDemandMaxReadRequestUnits

name: OnDemandMaxWriteRequestUnits
definition: Configured or effective write ceiling for on-demand write request units at table or GSI level.
optional_context_fields: Table is provisioned or metric not ingested in this workspace
absence_means: Useful only for on-demand or mixed fleets
cardinality_footguns: cloudwatch=OnDemandMaxWriteRequestUnits

name: ThrottledRequests
definition: Request-level throttling indicator; increments when a request is rejected by throughput limits.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Request-level and event-level throttles are not interchangeable

name: ReadThrottleEvents
definition: Read-side throttle events for tables or GSIs; stronger root-cause detail than request-level throttles.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: One request can create multiple throttle events

name: WriteThrottleEvents
definition: Write-side throttle events for tables or GSIs; shows table or index write pain.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: One request can create multiple throttle events

name: ReadProvisionedThroughputThrottleEvents
definition: Read requests throttled due to provisioned throughput limits.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Interpret only when provisioned mode is active

name: WriteProvisionedThroughputThrottleEvents
definition: Write requests throttled due to provisioned throughput limits.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Interpret only when provisioned mode is active

name: ReadKeyRangeThroughputThrottleEvents
definition: Read requests throttled due to partition-level key range limits.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Usually requires key-distribution investigation not only more capacity

name: WriteKeyRangeThroughputThrottleEvents
definition: Write requests throttled due to partition-level key range limits.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Usually requires key-distribution investigation not only more capacity

name: ReadAccountLimitThrottleEvents
definition: Read requests throttled due to account-level limits.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Table grouping is useful but the fix is often quota-level

name: WriteAccountLimitThrottleEvents
definition: Write requests throttled due to account-level limits.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Table grouping is useful but the fix is often quota-level

name: ReadMaxOnDemandThroughputThrottleEvents
definition: Read requests throttled due to on-demand maximum throughput settings.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Relevant only when on-demand max throughput is configured

name: WriteMaxOnDemandThroughputThrottleEvents
definition: Write requests throttled due to on-demand maximum throughput settings.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Relevant only when on-demand max throughput is configured

name: SuccessfulRequestLatency
definition: Latency of successful DynamoDB requests; best user-facing service metric when segmented by operation.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Do not average unlike operations if operation labels exist

name: ReturnedBytes
definition: Bytes returned by DynamoDB operations; useful to explain query or scan result growth.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Large result sets can dominate latency interpretation

name: ReturnedItemCount
definition: Number of items returned by DynamoDB operations; useful for query-shape efficiency.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Use with ReturnedBytes rather than alone

name: ConditionalCheckFailedRequests
definition: Conditional writes rejected because their condition evaluated false; often expected contention signal.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Do not equate directly to service failure

name: TransactionConflict
definition: Rejected item-level requests due to transactional conflicts between concurrent requests on the same items.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: High signal only for transactional workloads

name: UserErrors
definition: Aggregate HTTP 400-class request errors for DynamoDB or DynamoDB Streams in the Region and account.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Broad bucket; pair with specific metrics before escalation

name: SystemErrors
definition: Aggregate HTTP 500-class service-side request errors for DynamoDB in the Region and account.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Usually sparse and high-signal

name: ReplicationLatency
definition: Cross-Region replication latency for global tables; direct freshness signal.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Use receiving Region only in replication section

name: PendingReplicationCount
definition: Number of updates not yet written to another replica in legacy global tables.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Legacy-surface metric; keep gated until discovered

name: AgeOfOldestUnreplicatedRecord
definition: Elapsed time since the oldest not-yet-replicated record first appeared for Kinesis CDC.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Use in CDC section only

name: FailedToReplicateRecordCount
definition: Records DynamoDB failed to replicate to the Kinesis data stream.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: High-value if present and non-zero

name: ConsumedChangeDataCaptureUnits
definition: Consumed change data capture units for DynamoDB CDC workflows.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Interpret with workload changes rather than as a standalone health alarm

name: ThrottledPutRecordCount
definition: Records throttled while DynamoDB attempts to put CDC records into the Kinesis data stream.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Only relevant for Kinesis CDC

name: OnlineIndexPercentageProgress
definition: Relative progress of a new GSI build while the index is being added to a table.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Blank usually means no active build

name: OnlineIndexConsumedWriteCapacity
definition: Metric historically associated with GSI build write-capacity consumption; expected to show zero in current docs during index builds.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Low confidence for operational value; interpret with caution

name: OnlineIndexThrottleEvents
definition: Metric historically associated with throttles during a GSI build; expected to show zero in current docs during index builds.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Low confidence for operational value; interpret with caution

name: TimeToLiveDeletedItemCount
definition: Number of items deleted by TTL; useful to distinguish expected automated deletion churn from user write load.
absence_means: Metric not present in the live Tsuga export for this workspace
cardinality_footguns: Low-signal outside TTL-heavy workloads
